headline: IMAX CEO on how Paramount–Warner Bros. deal will impact Hollywood
summary: IMAX (IMAX) CEO Richard Gelfond joins Opening Bid host Brian Sozzi to discuss Paramount's (PSKY) anticipated acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) and the likely impacts it could have on the film production industry. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

headline: Netflix Calls It Quits on Warner Bros. Acquisition. Is the Stock a Buy?
summary: Netflix said it would not raise its offer to acquire certain Warner Bros. assets, effectively taking itself out of the running.

raw.headline: Netflix Calls It Quits on Warner Bros. Acquisition. Is the Stock a Buy?
raw.summary: Netflix said it would not raise its offer to acquire certain Warner Bros. assets, effectively taking itself out of the running.

headline: Paramount CEO David Ellison: Warner Bros. deal is pro-competitive and pro-consumer
summary: David Ellison, chairman and CEO of Paramount Skydance, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the company's deal to buy Warner Bros. Discovery.

raw.headline: Paramount CEO David Ellison: Warner Bros. deal is pro-competitive and pro-consumer

headline: CNBC Sport: Paramount may unwind WBD's sports strategy if merger goes through
summary: WBD's sports strategy it has deployed since it lost NBA rights may not make sense if it's acquired by Paramount.
